sys_script_client.description:
RAJ - STRY0062615 - Show and hide Primary Assignee, Assigned Member, Subtask Primary Assignee(s) and Subtask Assigned Member(s).
NOTE: I tried to do this in a UI Policy, but Parent is not on the New form for a new task. Portal pages don't apply ui policy well when fields not in the form are needed for the condition. So, logic was moved here.
This onload was added to do 1 thing... turn hide Subtask Primary Assignee(s) and SubTask Assigned Member(s) feilds on load. The onchange event left them showing on load.
sys_script_client.name: Task - onLoad multi-selects
